queries.query: how to sync code with local mirror
top_sections: Initialize ohos repository and sync the code.
queries.answer_preview:
Модель ответа сейчас временно недоступна. Показываю наиболее релевантные фрагменты из базы знаний. 1. ArkTS 1.2 Linux Previewer for mirror v140.2 | Sync and Build
Use the following instruction for sync the stable version of the mirror configuration v140.2:
https://gitee.com/rri_opensource/koala_projects/wikis/Arkoala/Stable%20Builds/v140%20Stable%20Build?sort_id=14709448#2025-10-30-guozejun-changes
Than download and apply the Linux Previewer ArkTS 1.2 patch:... 2. Sync&Build | Initialize repository and sync code
1. Obtain code for trunk (add --depth 1 for faster sync, https faster):
reference=/data/shared/ohos_mirror - use this option for local repo mirror (it is synced every 15 minutes) to achieve better time of code sync 3. XTS build and run | Initialize ohos repository and sync the code.
Use the instruction (https://gitee.com/mazurdenis/open-harmony/wikis/Sync&Build/Sync%26Build#initialize-repository-and-sync-code).

Модель ответа сейчас временно недоступна. Показываю наиболее релевантные фрагменты из базы знаний. 1. Stable Build & Regeneration v135 | Possible build issues
1) Build failed related to advanced_ui_component_static ```
diff --git a/adapter/ohos/build/BUILD.gn b/adapter/ohos/build/BUILD.gn
index e5214e4da48..7836a87cea6 100644
--- a/adapter/ohos/build/BUILD.gn
+++ b/adapter/ohos/build/BUILD.gn
@@ -20,7 +20,7 @@ group("ace_packages") { deps = [ "$ace_root/adapter/ohos/tools:tools_target", "$ace_root/advanced_ui_component:advanced_ui_component",... 2. Sync&Build | Initialize repository and sync code
1. create project directory inside "project's root" directory created on first step
1. Obtain code for trunk (add --depth 1 for faster sync, https faster):
ssh: repo init -u git@gitcode.com:openharmony/manifest.git -b master --no-repo-verify --reference=/data/shared/ohos_mirror
https: repo init -u https://gitcode.com/openharmony/manifest.git -b master --no-repo-verify --reference=/data/shared/ohos_mirror
